<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Projeção Financeira de Saúde - Riber Seguros</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg1:#f5f7fb;
      --bg2:#e9eefb;
      --card:#ffffffcc;
      --text:#0f172a;
      --muted:#64748b;
      --line:#e5e7eb;
      --accent:#0f172a;
      --accent-soft:#eef2ff;
      --good:#059669;
      --warn:#d97706;
      --shadow:0 16px 45px rgba(15,23,42,.09);
      --radius:24px;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      margin:0;
      font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif;
      color:var(--text);
      background:
        radial-gradient(circle at top, rgba(15,23,42,.12), transparent 28%),
        linear-gradient(180deg, var(--bg1) 0%, var(--bg2) 100%);
    }
    .container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 18px; }
    .hero {
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.85);
      border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.8);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      border-radius: 32px;
      padding: 24px;
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.3fr .9fr;
      gap:24px;
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    }
    .hero-left {
      display:flex; gap:18px; align-items:center;
    }
    .logo { height:72px; width:auto; object-fit:contain; }
    .eyebrow { font-size:12px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.18em; color:var(--muted); font-weight:700; }
    h1 { margin:6px 0 6px; font-size: 38px; line-height:1.05; }
    .sub { color:var(--muted); font-size:15px; }
    .hero-right { display:grid; gap:14px; }
    .spot {
      border:1px solid var(--line);
      background:#f8fafc;
      border-radius: 24px;
      padding: 18px;
    }
    .spot .label, .summary .label { font-size:13px; color:var(--muted); }
    .spot .value, .summary .value { margin-top:8px; font-size:30px; font-weight:800; }
    .spot .small { margin-top:8px; font-size:12px; color:var(--good); }
    .grid4 {
      margin-top:18px;
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr);
      gap:14px;
    }
    .summary {
      background:var(--card);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      border-radius: 24px;
      padding: 18px;
      display:flex;
      justify-content:space-between;
      align-items:flex-start;
      gap:10px;
    }
    .summary .icon {
      background:var(--accent);
      color:white;
      width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:16px;
      display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
      font-weight:700;font-size:18px;
    }
    .main-grid {
      margin-top:18px;
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1.2fr .8fr;
      gap:18px;
    }
    .card {
      background:var(--card);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      border-radius: 28px;
      padding: 20px;
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
    }
    .card h2 { margin:0 0 14px; font-size:22px; }
    .params {
      display:grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr);
      gap:14px;
    }
    .field label {
      display:block; font-size:13px; color:var(--muted); margin-bottom:7px; font-weight:600;
    }
    .field input {
      width:100%; padding:12px 14px; border-radius:18px; border:1px solid #d6dce7; background:white;
      font-size:15px; color:var(--text);
    }
    .actions .buttons, .scenario-buttons {
      display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px;
    }
    button {
      border:1px solid #d6dce7; background:white; color:var(--text);
      padding:11px 15px; border-radius:18px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer;
      transition:.18s ease;
    }
    button:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(15,23,42,.08); }
    button.primary { background:var(--accent); color:white; border-color:var(--accent); }
    button.soft { background:var(--accent-soft); border-color:#c7d2fe; }
    button.active { background:var(--accent); color:white; border-color:var(--accent); }
    .chart-card { margin-top:18px; }
    #chartWrap { height: 360px; }
    .edit-grid {
      margin-top:18px;
      display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap:18px;
    }
    .header-row {
      display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:12px;
    }
    table {
      width:100%; border-collapse: collapse; min-width: 700px;
    }
    th, td {
      padding:12px 10px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); text-align:left; font-size:14px;
    }
    th { color:var(--muted); font-size:12px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.03em; }
    td input {
      width:100%; padding:10px 12px; border-radius:14px; border:1px solid #d6dce7; background:white;
    }
    .table-wrap { overflow:auto; }
    .remove-btn {
      width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:14px; padding:0;
      display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    }
    .years { margin-top:18px; display:grid; gap:18px; }
    .year-card .top {
      display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:12px;
      padding-bottom:12px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); margin-bottom:10px;
    }
    .pill {
      background:var(--accent); color:white; padding:8px 12px; border-radius:999px; font-size:13px; font-weight:700;
    }
    .highlight { color:var(--warn); font-weight:800; }
    .hidden-client { display:none !important; }
    .toolbar {
      position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 20; padding: 10px 0 0;
    }
    .footer-note {
      margin-top:18px; background:#0f172a; color:#cbd5e1;
      border-radius:28px; padding:22px; box-shadow:var(--shadow);
      display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:16px;
    }
    .footer-note strong { color:white; }
    .muted { color:var(--muted); }
    @media (max-width: 1100px) {
      .hero, .main-grid, .edit-grid, .grid4 { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
      h1 { font-size: 30px; }
      .params { grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    }
    @media print {
      body { background:white; }
      .toolbar, .edit-grid, .actions-card, .client-hide-print, .scenario-buttons, .footer-note { display:none !important; }
      .card, .hero, .summary { box-shadow:none; background:white; border:1px solid #ddd; }
      .container { max-width:none; padding:0; }
      .year-card { break-inside: avoid; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="toolbar client-hide-print">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:10px;">
        <button id="presentationToggle">Modo cliente</button>
        <button id="pdfBtn" class="primary">PDF</button>
        <button id="csvBtn">Exportar CSV</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <section class="hero">
      <div class="hero-left">
        <img class="logo" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Riber Seguros" />
        <div>
          <div class="eyebrow">Dashboard premium</div>
          <h1>Projeção Financeira de Saúde</h1>
          <div class="sub">Simulação estratégica familiar com visão executiva e comercial.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-right">
        <div class="spot">
          <div class="label">Total mensal no ano base</div>
          <div class="value" id="baseTotal">R$ 0,00</div>
        </div>
        <div class="spot">
          <div class="label">Total mensal no último ano</div>
          <div class="value" id="finalTotal">R$ 0,00</div>
          <div class="small" id="growthPct">Variação acumulada: 0,00%</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="grid4">
      <div class="summary">
        <div>
          <div class="label">Vidas projetadas</div>
          <div class="value" id="membersCount">0</div>
          <div class="muted" style="font-size:12px;">Pessoas incluídas</div>
        </div>
        <div class="icon">👥</div>
      </div>
      <div class="summary">
        <div>
          <div class="label">Horizonte</div>
          <div class="value" id="horizonText">0 anos</div>
          <div class="muted" style="font-size:12px;" id="horizonSub"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="icon">🗓</div>
      </div>
      <div class="summary">
        <div>
          <div class="label">Reajuste anual</div>
          <div class="value" id="annualText">0,00%</div>
          <div class="muted" style="font-size:12px;">Definido por você</div>
        </div>
        <div class="icon">🛡</div>
      </div>
      <div class="summary">
        <div>
          <div class="label">Crescimento total</div>
          <div class="value" id="growthAbs">R$ 0,00</div>
          <div class="muted" style="font-size:12px;">Do primeiro ao último ano</div>
        </div>
        <div class="icon">📈</div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="main-grid client-hide-print">
      <div class="card">
        <h2>Parâmetros da simulação</h2>
        <div class="params">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="baseYear">Ano base</label>
            <input id="baseYear" type="number" />
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="projectionYears">Qtd. de anos</label>
            <input id="projectionYears" type="number" min="1" max="30" />
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="annualAdjustment">Reajuste anual (%)</label>
            <input id="annualAdjustment" type="number" step="0.01" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card actions-card">
        <h2>Ações e cenários</h2>
        <div class="scenario-buttons" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
          <button data-scenario="12">Conservador (12%)</button>
          <button data-scenario="18" class="active">Realista (18%)</button>
          <button data-scenario="25">Agressivo (25%)</button>
        </div>
        <div class="actions">
          <div class="buttons">
            <button id="addMemberBtn" class="soft">Adicionar pessoa</button>
            <button id="addBandBtn">Adicionar faixa</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="card chart-card">
      <h2>Evolução do custo mensal total</h2>
      <div id="chartWrap">
        <canvas id="chartCanvas"></canvas>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="edit-grid" id="editSection">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="header-row">
          <h2>Pessoas seguradas</h2>
          <button id="addMemberBtn2" class="soft">Adicionar pessoa</button>
        </div>
        <div class="table-wrap">
          <table id="membersTable">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Nome</th>
                <th>Nascimento</th>
                <th>Custo atual</th>
                <th></th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody></tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="card">
        <div class="header-row">
          <h2>Faixas etárias</h2>
          <button id="addBandBtn2">Adicionar faixa</button>
        </div>
        <div class="table-wrap">
          <table id="bandsTable">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Idade mínima</th>
                <th>Percentual (%)</th>
                <th></th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody></tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="years" id="yearsContainer"></section>

    <section class="footer-note client-hide-print">
      <div>
        <strong>Pronto para apresentação premium.</strong><br />
        A base já está funcional para cálculo, edição, cenário, PDF e publicação no GitHub Pages.
      </div>
      <button id="pdfBtn2" class="primary">Gerar PDF</button>
    </section>
  </div>

  <script>
    const state = {
      baseYear: new Date().getFullYear(),
      projectionYears: 10,
      annualAdjustment: 18,
      presentationMode: false,
      members: [
        { id: crypto.randomUUID(), name: "Ricardo", birthDate: "1986-05-08", currentCost: 2200 },
        { id: crypto.randomUUID(), name: "Giseli", birthDate: "1987-11-28", currentCost: 1900 },
        { id: crypto.randomUUID(), name: "Melina", birthDate: "2024-11-08", currentCost: 700 },
        { id: crypto.randomUUID(), name: "Bernardo", birthDate: "2025-12-08", currentCost: 400 },
      ],
      bands: [
        { minAge: 0, percent: 0 },
        { minAge: 19, percent: 18 },
        { minAge: 24, percent: 21 },
        { minAge: 29, percent: 20 },
        { minAge: 34, percent: 14 },
        { minAge: 39, percent: 3 },
        { minAge: 44, percent: 21.75 },
        { minAge: 49, percent: 17.62 },
        { minAge: 54, percent: 19 },
        { minAge: 59, percent: 75 },
      ]
    };

    const el = (id) => document.getElementById(id);

    function money(value) {
      return new Intl.NumberFormat('pt-BR', { style: 'currency', currency: 'BRL' }).format(Number(value || 0));
    }

    function pct(value) {
      return Number(value || 0).toFixed(2).replace('.', ',') + '%';
    }

    function calculateCurrentAgeIgnoringBirthday(birthDate) {
      if (!birthDate) return 0;
      const today = new Date();
      const birth = new Date(birthDate + 'T00:00:00');
      if (Number.isNaN(birth.getTime())) return 0;
      return today.getFullYear() - birth.getFullYear();
    }

    function getSortedBands() {
      return [...state.bands].sort((a,b) => Number(a.minAge) - Number(b.minAge));
    }

    function getBandMinAge(age) {
      const bands = getSortedBands();
      let result = bands[0]?.minAge ?? 0;
      for (const band of bands) {
        if (age >= Number(band.minAge)) result = Number(band.minAge);
        else break;
      }
      return Number(result);
    }

    function getBandPercent(age) {
      const bands = getSortedBands();
      let result = bands[0]?.percent ?? 0;
      for (const band of bands) {
        if (age >= Number(band.minAge)) result = Number(band.percent);
        else break;
      }
      return Number(result);
    }

    function computeRowsByYear() {
      return Array.from({ length: Number(state.projectionYears) }, (_, yearIndex) => {
        const year = Number(state.baseYear) + yearIndex;
        const rows = state.members.map(member => {
          const baseAge = calculateCurrentAgeIgnoringBirthday(member.birthDate);
          const age = baseAge + yearIndex;
          const prevAge = yearIndex === 0 ? age : baseAge + yearIndex - 1;
          const annualPct = yearIndex === 0 ? 0 : Number(state.annualAdjustment);
          const currentBand = getBandMinAge(age);
          const prevBand = getBandMinAge(prevAge);
          const bandAdjustment = yearIndex === 0 ? 0 : (currentBand === prevBand ? 0 : getBandPercent(age));

          let finalCost = Number(member.currentCost || 0);
          if (yearIndex > 0) {
            for (let i = 1; i <= yearIndex; i++) {
              const loopAge = baseAge + i;
              const loopPrevAge = baseAge + i - 1;
              const loopBand = getBandMinAge(loopAge);
              const loopPrevBand = getBandMinAge(loopPrevAge);
              const loopBandAdj = loopBand === loopPrevBand ? 0 : getBandPercent(loopAge);
              finalCost = finalCost * (1 + Number(state.annualAdjustment)/100 + loopBandAdj/100);
            }
          }

          let previousCost = Number(member.currentCost || 0);
          if (yearIndex > 0) {
            previousCost = Number(member.currentCost || 0);
            for (let i = 1; i < yearIndex; i++) {
              const loopAge = baseAge + i;
              const loopPrevAge = baseAge + i - 1;
              const loopBand = getBandMinAge(loopAge);
              const loopPrevBand = getBandMinAge(loopPrevAge);
              const loopBandAdj = loopBand === loopPrevBand ? 0 : getBandPercent(loopAge);
              previousCost = previousCost * (1 + Number(state.annualAdjustment)/100 + loopBandAdj/100);
            }
          }

          return {
            ...member,
            age,
            year,
            baseCost: previousCost,
            annualAdjustment: annualPct,
            bandAdjustment,
            finalCost,
          };
        });
        return {
          year,
          rows,
          total: rows.reduce((sum, row) => sum + Number(row.finalCost || 0), 0),
        };
      });
    }

    function renderMembersTable() {
      const tbody = el('membersTable').querySelector('tbody');
      tbody.innerHTML = '';
      state.members.forEach((member) => {
        const tr = document.createElement('tr');
        tr.innerHTML = `
          <td><input value="${member.name || ''}" placeholder="Nome" /></td>
          <td><input type="date" value="${member.birthDate || ''}" /></td>
          <td><input type="number" step="0.01" value="${member.currentCost ?? 0}" placeholder="0,00" /></td>
          <td><button class="remove-btn">✕</button></td>
        `;
        const inputs = tr.querySelectorAll('input');
        inputs[0].addEventListener('input', (e) => { member.name = e.target.value; render(); });
        inputs[1].addEventListener('input', (e) => { member.birthDate = e.target.value; render(); });
        inputs[2].addEventListener('input', (e) => { member.currentCost = Number(e.target.value || 0); render(); });
        tr.querySelector('button').addEventListener('click', () => {
          state.members = state.members.filter(m => m.id !== member.id);
          render();
        });
        tbody.appendChild(tr);
      });
    }

    function renderBandsTable() {
      const tbody = el('bandsTable').querySelector('tbody');
      tbody.innerHTML = '';
      state.bands.forEach((band, idx) => {
        const tr = document.createElement('tr');
        tr.innerHTML = `
          <td><input type="number" value="${band.minAge}" /></td>
          <td><input type="number" step="0.01" value="${band.percent}" /></td>
          <td><button class="remove-btn">✕</button></td>
        `;
        const inputs = tr.querySelectorAll('input');
        inputs[0].addEventListener('input', (e) => { band.minAge = Number(e.target.value || 0); render(); });
        inputs[1].addEventListener('input', (e) => { band.percent = Number(e.target.value || 0); render(); });
        tr.querySelector('button').addEventListener('click', () => {
          state.bands.splice(idx, 1);
          render();
        });
        tbody.appendChild(tr);
      });
    }

    function renderSummaries(rowsByYear) {
      const baseTotal = rowsByYear[0]?.total || 0;
      const finalTotal = rowsByYear[rowsByYear.length - 1]?.total || 0;
      const absGrowth = finalTotal - baseTotal;
      const pctGrowth = baseTotal > 0 ? (absGrowth / baseTotal) * 100 : 0;

      el('baseTotal').textContent = money(baseTotal);
      el('finalTotal').textContent = money(finalTotal);
      el('growthPct').textContent = 'Variação acumulada: ' + pct(pctGrowth);
      el('membersCount').textContent = String(state.members.length);
      el('horizonText').textContent = state.projectionYears + ' anos';
      el('horizonSub').textContent = 'De ' + state.baseYear + ' até ' + (Number(state.baseYear) + Number(state.projectionYears) - 1);
      el('annualText').textContent = pct(state.annualAdjustment);
      el('growthAbs').textContent = money(absGrowth);
    }

    function renderYears(rowsByYear) {
      const wrap = el('yearsContainer');
      wrap.innerHTML = '';
      rowsByYear.forEach(block => {
        const card = document.createElement('div');
        card.className = 'card year-card';
        card.innerHTML = `
          <div class="top">
            <h2 style="margin:0;">Ano ${block.year}</h2>
            <div class="pill">Total mensal: ${money(block.total)}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="table-wrap">
            <table>
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>Nome</th>
                  <th>Nascimento</th>
                  <th>Idade</th>
                  <th>Custo base</th>
                  <th>Reajuste anual</th>
                  <th>Reajuste faixa</th>
                  <th>Custo final</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                ${block.rows.map(row => `
                  <tr>
                    <td><strong>${row.name || ''}</strong></td>
                    <td>${row.birthDate ? new Date(row.birthDate + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('pt-BR') : ''}</td>
                    <td>${row.age}</td>
                    <td>${money(row.baseCost)}</td>
                    <td>${pct(row.annualAdjustment)}</td>
                    <td><span class="${row.bandAdjustment > 0 ? 'highlight' : 'muted'}">${pct(row.bandAdjustment)}</span></td>
                    <td><strong>${money(row.finalCost)}</strong></td>
                  </tr>
                `).join('')}
                <tr>
                  <td colspan="6" style="text-align:right;"><strong>Total mensal</strong></td>
                  <td><strong>${money(block.total)}</strong></td>
                </tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        `;
        wrap.appendChild(card);
      });
    }

    function drawChart(rowsByYear) {
      const canvas = el('chartCanvas');
      const parent = el('chartWrap');
      const width = parent.clientWidth;
      const height = parent.clientHeight;
      canvas.width = width * devicePixelRatio;
      canvas.height = height * devicePixelRatio;
      canvas.style.width = width + 'px';
      canvas.style.height = height + 'px';
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      ctx.scale(devicePixelRatio, devicePixelRatio);
      ctx.clearRect(0,0,width,height);

      const padding = { top: 18, right: 18, bottom: 36, left: 58 };
      const chartW = width - padding.left - padding.right;
      const chartH = height - padding.top - padding.bottom;
      const data = rowsByYear.map(x => Number(x.total || 0));
      if (!data.length) return;

      const max = Math.max(...data) * 1.08 || 1;
      const min = 0;

      ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
      ctx.fillStyle = '#64748b';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.font = '12px Inter, sans-serif';

      for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
        const y = padding.top + (chartH / 4) * i;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(padding.left, y);
        ctx.lineTo(width - padding.right, y);
        ctx.setLineDash([3,4]);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        const value = max - (max / 4) * i;
        ctx.fillText(Math.round(value).toString(), 8, y + 4);
      }

      const pts = rowsByYear.map((d, i) => {
        const x = padding.left + (chartW * (rowsByYear.length === 1 ? 0.5 : i / (rowsByYear.length - 1)));
        const y = padding.top + chartH - ((Number(d.total) - min) / (max - min)) * chartH;
        return { x, y, year: d.year, total: d.total };
      });

      const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, padding.top, 0, padding.top + chartH);
      gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(15,23,42,0.20)');
      gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(15,23,42,0.02)');

      ctx.beginPath();
      pts.forEach((p, i) => {
        if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y);
        else ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y);
      });
      ctx.lineTo(pts[pts.length - 1].x, padding.top + chartH);
      ctx.lineTo(pts[0].x, padding.top + chartH);
      ctx.closePath();
      ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
      ctx.fill();

      ctx.beginPath();
      pts.forEach((p, i) => {
        if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y);
        else ctx.lineTo(p.x, p.y);
      });
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
      ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
      ctx.stroke();

      pts.forEach((p) => {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.stroke();
      });

      ctx.fillStyle = '#475569';
      ctx.textAlign = 'center';
      pts.forEach((p) => {
        ctx.fillText(String(p.year), p.x, height - 10);
      });
      ctx.textAlign = 'left';
    }

    function exportCsv(rowsByYear) {
      const headers = ['Ano','Nome','Nascimento','Idade','Custo Base','Reajuste Anual (%)','Reajuste Faixa (%)','Custo Final'];
      const lines = [headers.join(';')];
      rowsByYear.forEach(block => {
        block.rows.forEach(row => {
          lines.push([
            block.year,
            row.name,
            row.birthDate,
            row.age,
            Number(row.baseCost).toFixed(2).replace('.', ','),
            Number(row.annualAdjustment).toFixed(2).replace('.', ','),
            Number(row.bandAdjustment).toFixed(2).replace('.', ','),
            Number(row.finalCost).toFixed(2).replace('.', ',')
          ].join(';'));
        });
      });
      const blob = new Blob(['\uFEFF' + lines.join('\n')], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const link = document.createElement('a');
      link.href = url;
      link.download = 'projecao-seguro-saude-premium.csv';
      link.click();
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    }

    function render() {
      el('baseYear').value = state.baseYear;
      el('projectionYears').value = state.projectionYears;
      el('annualAdjustment').value = state.annualAdjustment;

      document.querySelectorAll('[data-scenario]').forEach(btn => {
        btn.classList.toggle('active', Number(btn.dataset.scenario) === Number(state.annualAdjustment));
      });

      document.body.classList.toggle('presentation-mode', state.presentationMode);
      el('presentationToggle').textContent = state.presentationMode ? 'Modo edição' : 'Modo cliente';
      el('editSection').classList.toggle('hidden-client', state.presentationMode);
      document.querySelector('.main-grid').classList.toggle('hidden-client', state.presentationMode);

      renderMembersTable();
      renderBandsTable();

      const rowsByYear = computeRowsByYear();
      renderSummaries(rowsByYear);
      renderYears(rowsByYear);
      drawChart(rowsByYear);

      el('csvBtn').onclick = () => exportCsv(rowsByYear);
      el('pdfBtn').onclick = () => window.print();
      el('pdfBtn2').onclick = () => window.print();
    }

    el('baseYear').addEventListener('input', (e) => { state.baseYear = Number(e.target.value || new Date().getFullYear()); render(); });
    el('projectionYears').addEventListener('input', (e) => { state.projectionYears = Math.max(1, Number(e.target.value || 1)); render(); });
    el('annualAdjustment').addEventListener('input', (e) => { state.annualAdjustment = Number(e.target.value || 0); render(); });
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-scenario]').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      state.annualAdjustment = Number(btn.dataset.scenario);
      render();
    }));
    el('presentationToggle').addEventListener('click', () => { state.presentationMode = !state.presentationMode; render(); });
    el('addMemberBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      state.members.push({ id: crypto.randomUUID(), name: '', birthDate: '', currentCost: 0 });
      render();
    });
    el('addMemberBtn2').addEventListener('click', () => {
      state.members.push({ id: crypto.randomUUID(), name: '', birthDate: '', currentCost: 0 });
      render();
    });
    el('addBandBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      state.bands.push({ minAge: 0, percent: 0 });
      render();
    });
    el('addBandBtn2').addEventListener('click', () => {
      state.bands.push({ minAge: 0, percent: 0 });
      render();
    });
    window.addEventListener('resize', render);

    render();
  </script>
</body>
</html>
